flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Carolina State University at Raleigh fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at North Carolina State University at Raleigh are 52% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($68.8k vs $45.3k).
